name: Claim denied by GEO agency— what next for my law firm?
description: Demand letter, then mediate/sue.[1] Document all.

mainEntity.name: Claim denied by GEO agency— what next for my law firm?

acceptedAnswer.text: Demand letter, then mediate/sue.[1] Document all.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Send a formal demand letter citing contract breaches and evidence, then consider mediation or suit if ignored.** Many resolve pre-litigation.[1]

Agencies often settle to avoid precedent.[9] Applies nationwide.

**Key factors:**
- 30-day cure period common.
- Escalate to BBB/FTC.
- Preserve all docs.
- Assess jurisdiction.

Use certified mail; copy lawyer. Track response timeline strictly.
